name: Kochi-Muziris Biennale
description: International contemporary-art festival staged across heritage warehouses and public venues.
planning_notes: Dates and venues vary by edition; book Fort Kochi accommodation early.

name: Cochin Carnival
typical_period: Last week of December; climax on 1 January
description: Year-end street celebrations, parades and cultural programmes in Fort Kochi.
planning_notes: Expect road closures and very high crowds on New Year's Eve and Day.
